title: Oil rebounds as supply disruptions mount
section_path: Oil rebounds as supply disruptions mount
section_path_text: Oil rebounds as supply disruptions mount
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Crude oil futures rebounded as the US-Iran ceasefire failed to allay fears of further supply disruptions. The Strait of Hormuz remained largely blocked on Wednesday, despite its reopening being a key part of the agreement. Just three ships were observed leaving the region on Wednesday, according to Bloomberg ship tracking data.
